creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text: This is a pretty big deal for a lot of us who run small-scale mailing-lists. mailman2 will be supported by Ubuntu until 2025, presumably by RHEL for a similar time period. Should FreeBSD really be the first major OS to kick it to the curb? It would feel more like a kick in the teeth for a lot of people who have a setup that is *working* when the alternatives require a substantial investment in time and are not feature-complete.
